scenario.name: VOS-RS caller UAC long call
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "1001" <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]vosrsCaller[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=caller 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=VOS-RS SIPp caller c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "1001" <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]vosrsCaller[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "1001" <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]vosrsCaller[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
